headline: Old Age space ETFs gain over New Age stocks since SpaceX IPO
summary: SpaceX's (SPCX) IPO may be creating a vacuum, and space-themed ETFs are benefitting from the latest phase in the Space Race. Yahoo Finance Markets and Data Editor Jared Blikre looks at the array of thematic space ETFs and how they have been gaining since SpaceX's mega-IPO last Friday.

headline: SpaceX is sucking the oxygen out of the new space trade
summary: SpaceX stock is flying, and so are shares of  older aerospace incumbents like GE Aerospace and Boeing.

headline: Can Defense Contracts Help Fuel Boeing's Next Phase of Growth?
summary: BA's defense unit posts 21% revenue growth, $9B in orders and an $86B backlog, signaling a bigger role in Boeing's recovery strategy.
